what_is_interesting: Marcus Aurelius's Meditations were a private journal written entirely for himself — the most powerful man in the ancient world talking to no one but himself — and we were never supposed to read a single word of it.
likely_image: A dramatic bust or portrait of Marcus Aurelius in candlelit, shadowy Roman-era lighting — stoic, ancient, powerful.
winner_reasoning: A viewer sees Marcus Aurelius's stoic stone face + 'HIS SECRET' and feels an irresistible pull — the most powerful man in the ancient world had private thoughts he never shared with anyone, and you're about to hear them.
